_note: Version registry + config for the embed loader (public/embed.js). Forms live in the ROOT GitHub Pages repo pa082508.github.io under forms/1-data-sources/. embed.js pins the iframe to versions[<current|data-version>]; resolves the center slug via `centers`; and (in embed mode) writes the submission via `supabase` anon RPC submit_enrollment_form (p_source=embed). anon key is public (same as the SPA bundle).
_stage1_note: Schema 2 (Stage 1): forms.enroll and forms.iea keep their embed-loader fields (current/versions/fallbackUrl/submissionType) UNCHANGED — only descriptive fields were added, so embed.js is unaffected. `current` points ONLY at files that exist today; no `current` was flipped. Records whose signed conversions are not built yet carry versions:{v1:'PENDING'} with current:null (fluid conversions = Stage 2). Stage-1 deltas applied 2026-07-07 (evening-packet answers): (a) conditional.trigger string → conditional.triggers[] array; (b) usda_waiver uses satisfies:['iea'] (retired pairedWith); (c) submissionType:'medical' added to dcy_01236/01217/01305 (single type + form_data.dcy_form discriminator — the loader ignores these records so embed is unaffected). Still deferred to evening: intakeMode/signer for special_diet/fluid_milk/infant_meals/usda_waiver; titles for dcy_01305/dcy_01236/dcy_01217.

usda_waiver.title: USDA Income Eligibility Waiver (declined IEA)
usda_waiver.note: Alternative to IEA for the same income_eligibility child-record slot: packet asks 'Will you apply for free/reduced-price meals?' → Yes ⇒ iea, No ⇒ this waiver (parent-signed). Exactly one is always on file; satisfies:['iea'] marks the shared slot met.

org._note: STAGE-2 SWAP POINT — org-level branding. Interim values live here (editable as DATA, no code deploy); Stage 2 sources them from org settings (OrgContext). name = organization display name used in form headers/body tokens ([data-fk-org]); marketing_text = admin-editable promo copy (credits / material incentives) injected into the Parent Consent marketing slot — empty = nothing renders. Read by parent-facing forms via ../../enroll-registry.json.
org.name: Play Academy, Inc.

conditions._note: SINGLE SOURCE OF CONDITIONAL LOGIC — the one map. Read by: (a) packets.admission If-applicable grouping (a conditional form's group = forms[key].condition); (b) parent-forms.html + ParentPacketPage group headers & order (this key order); (c) Stage-2 in-form conditional hints (detectOn = the form whose answers raise it; detect = the answer signals; issue:'director' = handed out in person, rendered as a director line not a parent link). Do NOT encode conditions anywhere else in code or in a second map. Supersedes the per-form conditional.triggers used in Stage 1.

infant.title: If your child is under 1 year old

special_diet.title: Special diet or milk substitution
detect: special diet: exclude a food group

admission.title: Admission Packet
admission._note: Ordered admission packet assembled from library sections. Composition is DATA — edit slots here, no code change. section: mandatory | if_applicable. A conditional slot's If-applicable group and its director-line rendering are DERIVED from forms[key].condition + the single conditions map (no per-slot condition here — one map only). Slot URL resolves via forms[key].current→versions[current] (interim/dark slots light up when flipped). Consumed by in-app ParentPacketPage + parent-forms.html. Keep identical in the app copy (public/enroll-registry.json) and the Pages copy (repo-root enroll-registry.json).

slots.label: Parent Consent (E-Signature)
slots.note: Signed first — adopts your signature for the rest of the packet.

slots.label: Child Enrollment & Health (DCY 01234)
slots.note: The State of Ohio enrollment record: contacts, health, authorizations. One per child.

slots.label: CACFP Enrollment
slots.note: Days, hours and meals your child receives in care. One per child, yearly.

slots.label: Income Eligibility (IEA)
slots.note: Free / reduced-price meal eligibility. One per household, valid 12 months.

slots.label: USDA Income Eligibility Waiver
slots.note: Sign and return ONLY if you are not applying for free/reduced-price meals — the alternative to the Income Eligibility Application above. Exactly one of the two is on file.

slots.label: Child Release Authorization
slots.note: Who may pick up your child, plus media consent.

slots.label: Parent Responsibilities
slots.note: Program policies you acknowledge.

slots.label: Center Parent Information
slots.note: Required information for parents at your center.

slots.label: What To Bring
slots.note: Checklist of items to bring for your child.

slots.label: Child Medical Statement (JFS 01305)
slots.note: Completed and signed by your child's physician. Required for every enrolling child — print and take to the doctor's office.

slots.label: Building for the Future
slots.note: Keep — USDA CACFP family nutrition information.

slots.label: Transition into the Program
slots.note: Complete and return.

slots.label: WIC Information
slots.note: Keep — how to apply for WIC benefits.

slots.label: Basic Infant Care Plan (DCY 01218)
slots.note: For infants under one year of age.

slots.label: Infant Meal Preference
slots.note: Who provides formula and when solids are introduced.

slots.label: Special Diet Statement
slots.note: Food accommodations; the medical section is completed by your provider.

slots.label: Fluid Milk Substitution
slots.note: Request a non-dairy beverage instead of fluid milk.

slots.label: Topical Product Consent
slots.note: Sunscreen, ointments and similar topical products.

slots.label: Administration of Medication (DCY 01217)
slots.note: Your director provides this in person if your child needs medication.

slots.label: Care Plan for a Child with Special Needs (DCY 01236)
slots.note: Your director provides this in person if your child has special health needs.
